places.name: Eska
places.description: Farm-to-table restaurant in a converted bakery with sourdough bread, seasonal Czech cuisine, and one of Karlín's best brunches.

places.name: Můj šálek kávy
places.description: Specialty coffee pioneer in Prague with excellent single-origin brews, a cozy atmosphere, and plenty of space to work.

places.name: Café Jen
places.description: Relaxed neighbourhood café with good coffee, homemade cakes, and a welcoming vibe perfect for working from.

places.name: Bistro 8
places.description: Beloved Karlín lunch spot serving fresh daily specials, sandwiches, and salads in a no-frills, friendly setting.

places.name: Krásný ztráty
places.description: Charming neighbourhood restaurant in Karlín with creative Czech-inspired cuisine and a great wine selection.

places.name: Café Savoy
places.description: Grand Viennese-style café in Smíchov serving exceptional breakfasts, pastries, and lunches in a stunning Art Nouveau hall.

places.name: Sisters
places.description: Tiny spot near Old Town Square famous for open-faced sandwiches (chlebíčky) — the best quick Czech bite in the city.

places.name: Café Imperial
places.description: Iconic 1914 café with original mosaic-tiled walls, serving classic breakfasts and Czech cuisine in a breathtaking setting.

places.name: Lokál Dlouhááá
places.description: Buzzing Czech pub with tank-fresh Pilsner Urquell, classic svíčková, and a lively crowd — the real Prague experience.

places.name: EMA Espresso Bar
places.description: Compact specialty coffee bar in Old Town with some of Prague's best espresso and a loyal local following.

places.name: Café Letka
places.description: Neighbourhood gem in Letná with excellent coffee, homemade food, and a sunny terrace — locals' first choice for weekend brunch.

places.name: Cobra
places.description: Relaxed all-day bar and restaurant in Holešovice with creative small plates, natural wine, and a neighbourhood crowd.

places.name: La Bohème Café
places.description: Spacious, light-filled café in Letná that's a favourite with freelancers — great flat whites and a calm working atmosphere.

places.name: Fofola
places.description: Cool café-bar in Holešovice with excellent coffee, light bites, and a laid-back vibe beloved by the creative scene.

places.name: Dish
places.description: Modern restaurant in Holešovice with an inventive seasonal menu, open kitchen, and one of Prague's better tasting menus.

places.name: Café V lese
places.description: Quirky, art-filled café in Žižkov with cheap coffee, board games, and a bohemian atmosphere — zero pretension.

places.name: Vinohradský parlament
places.description: Traditional Czech pub-restaurant in Vinohrady that locals love for honest food, good beer, and no tourist markup.

places.name: Las Adelitas
places.description: Authentic Mexican in Vinohrady with proper tacos, mezcal, and a lively atmosphere — a refreshing change from Czech classics.

places.name: Kavárna Jedna
places.description: Minimalist specialty coffee café in Vinohrady with fast wifi, communal tables, and a calm focus — built for laptop work.

places.name: Aromi
places.description: Prague's most celebrated Italian restaurant in Vinohrady — exceptional pasta and fish, elegant but unfussy.
